name: New1Direction/webmcp-anything
description: Turn any URL into agent-callable MCP tools. 5-tier adapter chain (Shopify ~4M storefronts / generic JSON-LD / OpenAPI compiler / known providers like Stripe/Slack/Notion/GitHub / Claude 3.5 Haiku fallback). Hosted at [wmcp.sh](https://wmcp.sh) — free public API, paid tier with custom adapters + verified directory listings.
